summary: Iteration 22 testing complete. All new Zones circle/polygon features working correctly. Frontend: All 12 test cases passed. The Zones page displays both circles and polygons on the map, stats bar shows counts for 'Cercles' and 'Polygones', modal has shape selector with radius slider for circles, zone detail drawer shows shape info with center coords and radius for circles.
passed_tests: Frontend: Zones page loads with both circles and polygons on the map
Frontend: Stats bar shows counts for 'Cercles' (2) and 'Polygones' (2)
Frontend: 'Nouvelle zone' modal has shape selector with 'Cercle' and 'Polygone' options
Frontend: When 'Cercle' is selected, a radius slider (50m-2000m) appears
Frontend: 'Dessiner le cercle sur la carte' button is visible in the modal
Frontend: Clicking on a circle zone opens the detail drawer with shape info, center coords, and radius
Frontend: Clicking on a polygon zone opens the detail drawer with 'Polygone' shape badge
Frontend: Zone list items show shape icons (circle icon or hexagon icon) next to the zone name
Frontend: Creating a new zone with 'Cercle' shape and saving works
Frontend: Creating a new zone with 'Polygone' shape and saving works
Frontend: Edit modal for existing zone preserves the shape type
Frontend: Deleting a zone works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: PremiumZones.jsx: Well-structured component with DrawController for interactive map drawing
PremiumZones.jsx: Shape selector properly toggles between circle and polygon modes
PremiumZones.jsx: Radius slider correctly appears/disappears based on shape selection
PremiumZones.jsx: Zone detail drawer properly displays shape-specific info (center/radius for circles)
PremiumZones.jsx: CRUD operations work correctly with local state (MOCK_ZONES)
PremiumZones.jsx: Good use of data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Used MOCK_ZONES data (4 zones: 2 circles, 2 polygons)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 Zones circle/polygon feature fully tested. Key data-testids: zones-title, zones-stats, zones-add-btn, zones-map, zones-list, zone-item-{n}, zone-detail-drawer, zone-detail-close, zone-edit-btn, zone-delete-btn, zone-edit-modal, zone-shape-selector, shape-circle-btn, shape-polygon-btn, zone-radius-slider, draw-on-map-btn, zone-save-btn. Zone data is MOCK (local state only, not connected to backend API). Map uses Leaflet with react-leaflet. Circles render with <Circle> component and polygons with <Polygon>.

zones_page_load.details: Page loads with map showing both circles and polygons

stats_bar.details: Shows counts for Chantier, Dépôt, Zone restreinte, Parking, Cercles, Polygones

shape_selector.details: Modal has Cercle and Polygone buttons with proper styling

radius_slider.details: Slider appears when Cercle selected, hidden when Polygone selected, range 50m-2000m

draw_on_map_button.details: Button text changes based on shape: 'Dessiner le cercle sur la carte' or 'Dessiner le polygone sur la carte'

circle_zone_drawer.details: Shows 'Cercle' badge, center coordinates, and radius

zone_list_icons.details: Circle icon (purple) for circles, Hexagon icon (blue) for polygons

create_circle_zone.details: New circle zone created and appears in list and map

create_polygon_zone.details: New polygon zone created and appears in list and map

edit_preserves_shape.details: Edit modal correctly shows the zone's shape type selected

delete_zone.details: Zone deleted and removed from list and map

mocked_apis_list: Zone data is MOCK/local state only (MOCK_ZONES in PremiumZones.jsx), not connected to backend API
